morning_context.market_summary: Risk appetite is mixed: SPY has been hovering around the 670-680 zone while volatility has stayed elevated, with recent VIX prints in the mid-20s. Geopolitical and macro uncertainty are keeping downside tails active, so selective long setups with defined stops are preferable to broad beta exposure. In this regime, quality large caps with clear catalysts and controlled position sizing are favored.
